title: salix × tetrapla
intro: Salix × tetrapla, also known as the tetraploid willow, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross-pollination of two willow species, primarily Salix alba and Salix fragilis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Salix × tetrapla include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. In herbal preparations, the bark of the Salix × tetrapla plant is often used to create teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used both internally and externally to harness its medicinal properties.
